content:
fitzgen closed issue #1118:

We might consider tests for is_ctrl_typevar_candidate and verify_polymorphic; not because they are so very complex but a couple of illustrative tests might explain how these functions work and ensure that when I touch this file I don't mess up the intended behavior :smile:.

_Originally posted by @abrown in https://github.com/CraneStation/cranelift/pull/969_

fitzgen commented on issue #1118:

Things have been working fine for years at this point since any of the type inference was updated. Closing this.
